# ImmoPro Design System (Generated by UI/UX Pro Max Skill)

**Query used:** "premium real estate agent Cameroon Douala Yaounde luxury property service"
**Project Name:** ImmoPro
**Generated:** 2026-05-28

This design system was generated using the UI/UX Pro Max skill and will be applied to the Astro + Tailwind implementation.

## Pattern
- **Name:** Real-Time / Operations Landing
- **Conversion Focus:** For ops/security/iot products. Demo or sandbox link. Trust signals.
- **CTA Placement:** Primary CTA in nav + After metrics
- **Color Strategy:** Dark or neutral. Status colors (green/amber/red). Data-dense but scannable.
- **Sections:** 1. Hero (product + live preview or status), 2. Key metrics/indicators, 3. How it works, 4. CTA (Start trial / Contact)

## Style
- **Name:** Exaggerated Minimalism
- **Mode Support:** Light ✓ Full | Dark ✓ Full
- **Keywords:** Bold minimalism, oversized typography, high contrast, negative space, loud minimal, statement design
- **Best For:** Fashion, architecture, portfolios, agency landing pages, luxury brands, editorial
- **Performance:** ⚡ Excellent | **Accessibility:** ✓ WCAG AA

**Application to ImmoPro (Real Estate in Cameroon):**
Adapt "Exaggerated Minimalism" toward elegant luxury real estate — oversized elegant headings (Cinzel), generous whitespace, high-quality photography first, sophisticated but trustworthy feel for premium properties in Douala, Yaoundé, Kribi.

## Colors (Recommended for ImmoPro)
| Role | Hex | CSS Variable | Notes |
|------|-----|--------------|-------|
| Primary | `#0F766E` | `--color-primary` | Trust teal |
| On Primary | `#FFFFFF` | `--color-on-primary` | |
| Secondary | `#14B8A6` | `--color-secondary` | |
| Accent/CTA | `#0369A1` | `--color-accent` | Professional blue |
| Background | `#F0FDFA` | `--color-background` | Light teal tint |
| Foreground | `#134E4A` | `--color-foreground` | Deep teal |
| Muted | `#E8F0F3` | `--color-muted` | |
| Border | `#99F6E4` | `--color-border` | |
| Destructive | `#DC2626` | `--color-destructive` | For Super Admin dangerous actions |
| Ring | `#0F766E` | `--color-ring` | |

**Notes from generator:** Trust teal + professional blue. Excellent for real estate (trust + premium).

## Typography
- **Heading:** Cinzel
- **Body:** Josefin Sans
- **Mood:** real estate, luxury, elegant, sophisticated, property, premium
- **Best For:** Real estate, luxury properties, architecture, interior design

**Google Fonts Import:**
```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Josefin+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');
```

## Key Effects
- font-size: clamp(3rem, 10vw, 12rem)
- font-weight: 900
- letter-spacing: -0.05em
- Massive whitespace

## Anti-Patterns to Avoid
- Poor photos
- No virtual tours (provide good placeholders or embeds)

## Pre-Delivery Checklist (from Pro Max)
- [ ] No emojis as icons (use SVG: Heroicons/Lucide or custom)
- [ ] cursor-pointer on all clickable elements
- [ ] Hover states with smooth transitions (150-300ms)
- [ ] Light mode: text contrast 4.5:1 minimum
- [ ] Focus states visible for keyboard nav
- [ ] prefers-reduced-motion respected
- [ ] Responsive: 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px

## How to Apply in Astro + Tailwind
- Set up in `src/styles/global.css` with the colors as CSS variables or Tailwind config.
- Use Cinzel for h1-h3, Josefin Sans for body.
- Apply generous spacing and bold but elegant typography on hero and property titles.
- For Super Admin: Use the destructive red prominently with strong warnings.

This design system will guide all visual and UX decisions for the public portal and (with adjustments) the agent/Super Admin areas.
